calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Apr-14-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Civil Harassment OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Pro Tem: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Diana Chen, CSR #11312 Bailiff: Deputy V. Jung.

Judy L. Hitchcock, Esq. for and with Petitioner: Gordon H. Gantz, who was present.

No appearance by the Respondent: Willie Smith.

The Petitioner was sworn.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 150 yards away from the following protected persons: Gordon H. Gantz and his residence.

Respondent must not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements.

Contact (directly or indirectly), telephone, send messages, mail, or e-mail.

Take any action to obtain the address or location of the Petitioner or his family or caretakers.

Respondent cannot own, possess, have, buy or try to buy, receive or try to receive, or in any other way get a gun or firearm and must turn in or sell guns or firearms.

This order is to be consistent with the criminal protective order.

Expires April 14, 2013

Order signed in open court.
